commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then shall your light break forth as the morning, and your health shall spring forth speedily: and your righteousness shall go before you; the glory of the LORD shall be your rear guard. Prosperity, (Calmet) or Saviour. (Haydock) Matthew iv. , and John i. (Calmet) Health. Aquila, "the scar of thy wound shall soon be covered. He shall close the rear, like the angel in the cloud, Exodus xiii. He will grant thee rest from bondage in the grave and in heaven.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
